verification_notes: Official planning, town code, GIS/map, permitting, and statewide health sources are identified. Keep non-public until district mapping and golden QA pass.

sources.title: Town of Christiansburg Planning and Zoning Overview
sources.excerpt: Christiansburg Planning administers the zoning ordinance, supports the Planning Commission and Board of Zoning Appeals, and assists with building permits, site plan review, subdivision plats, sign permits, and zoning ordinance enforcement.
sources.section_ref: Planning Department; zoning and development assistance

sources.title: Town of Christiansburg Town Code and Zoning Map Direction
sources.excerpt: Christiansburg directs applicants to Chapter 42, Zoning, of the Town Code for zoning regulations and to the Zoning Map or Town GeoWeb service to view zoning designations for a particular property.

sources.title: Town of Christiansburg GIS and Zoning Map
sources.excerpt: Christiansburg directs users to the official zoning map and Town GeoWeb service to view zoning designations for a property before consulting Chapter 42 zoning standards.

sources.title: Town of Christiansburg Permit and Plans Applications
sources.excerpt: Christiansburg states that permit applications are used to issue permits that allow a project to begin, while plan applications typically result in approval or denial of a plan through the town's digital plans and permitting system.

sources.title: Virginia Department of Health Food Establishment Plan Review
sources.excerpt: Virginia Department of Health guidance directs new or remodeled foodservice facilities to submit plan review materials, apply for a food establishment permit before opening, and obtain inspection before permit issuance.
